description_long: This lettuce object is a pale green, tightly packed head with a somewhat conical and irregular shape, resting on a wooden cutting board. The outer leaves are smooth and closely overlapping, forming a dense structure with subtle undulations and gentle folds. The surface displays a matte finish with visible veins and a prominent central rib running along the length of the leaves. The coloration is mostly a light green with hints of white, especially near the base and along the central rib. The overall form is compact, with the leaves wrapping around each other to create a solid, cohesive mass. The object appears fresh and crisp, typical of a cabbage or iceberg lettuce variety.
description: A pale green, tightly packed lettuce head with overlapping, smooth leaves and a prominent central rib, resting on a wooden board.
description_view_0: The lettuce is seen from a broad side, showing the rounded, overlapping leaves and subtle surface folds.
description_view_1: This view highlights the pointed, conical top and the compact layering of leaves, with the central rib visible near the base.
description_view_2: The opposite side reveals more of the leaf curvature and the dense, smooth surface with gentle undulations.
description_view_3: A rear view displays the central rib running vertically and the symmetrical, tightly packed leaf arrangement.
